package rulefixtures

import (
	"crypto/tls"
)

// scenario for hardcoded_tls_skip_verify: `tls.Config{InsecureSkipVerify: true}` in non-test code
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: error.
func scenario716Positive() *tls.Config {
	return &tls.Config{InsecureSkipVerify: true, MinVersion: tls.VersionTLS10}
}
